response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development and tooling, with strong skills in JavaScript/TypeScript, C#, and some Java, but lacks deep, recent experience with Java/JVM ecosystems (Spring, Kotlin, etc.) or IDE internals. His background in enterprise tooling is limited to AI-agent infrastructure and pricing systems, not enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE development. His strengths lie in diverse tech stacks and open-source contributions, but these don't directly align with the role's core requirements.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship with experience in diverse tech stacks (JavaScript, TypeScript, D, etc.)
Open-source contributions and leadership in developing tools/platforms
Proven ability to work on complex systems and large-scale codebases
concerns: Limited recent experience with Java/Kotlin/JVM ecosystems (Spring, Quarkus, etc.)
No direct experience with IDE internals or language tooling development
Background in web/mobile/embedded systems may not align with enterprise IDE tooling focus
